name: com.vfxtools.vfxinspector
description: A denser, more controllable replacement for Unity's Visual Effect inspector: a custom inspector for the VisualEffect component (Properties/Playback/Debug/Renderer tabs, scene gizmos, per-particle readback + CSV export) that wins over the stock VFX inspector. Tear off any tab as a dockable popup via the component's VFX Inspector context menu.
